sections.name: Verse 1 (第一段)
sections.lyrics: Why are there so many songs about rainbows? What's on the other side?
sections.funFact: 彩虹其實是完整的圓形！因為地面阻擋，我們平時才只能看到半圓。
sections.memory_prompt: Have you ever seen a double rainbow?

sections.name: Verse 2 (第二段)
sections.lyrics: And someone believed it. And look what it's done so far. What's so amazing that keeps us stargazing?
sections.funFact: 觀星就像在進行時間旅行！因為星星離我們太遠，我們現在看到的星光是來自多年前的。
sections.memory_prompt: Did you ever stargaze when you were younger?

sections.name: Chorus (副歌)
sections.lyrics: Someday we'll find it, the rainbow connection. The lovers, the dreamers and me.
sections.funFact: 「夢想家 (Dreamer)」這個詞源自古語，意指「喜悅」與「音樂」，非常適合這首歌。
sections.memory_prompt: Who is the biggest dreamer you've ever known?

sections.name: Bridge (過門)
sections.lyrics: All of us under its spell. We know that it's probably magic.
sections.funFact: 魔法本質上就是我們尚未完全理解的科學。古人常將彩虹的形成視為一種神祕力量。
sections.memory_prompt: Do you remember a time when something felt truly magical?

sections.name: Verse 3 (第三段)
sections.lyrics: Have you been half asleep? And have you heard voices? Is this the sweet sound that calms the young sailors?
sections.funFact: 在古老的航海傳說中，水手聽到的歌聲往往是風與水流過礁石產生的自然聲響。
sections.memory_prompt: What sweet sounds or music always bring you comfort?
